CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Data freshness is older than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness is older than 24 hours. Immediate action required to ensure data integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data freshness issue.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality percentage is below 99.9%. Immediate action required to ensure data integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data quality issue.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the range of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: Row count is outside the expected range of 17 to 25. Immediate action required to ensure data integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the row count issue.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit. Next-business-day attention required.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%. Next-business-day attention required.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and address any data quality issues.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%. Next-business-day attention required.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the issue with the merchant's data.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data. No immediate action required.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds
INFO.message: Daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds. No immediate action required.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count for any trends.
